I made some changes to your submission, the patch can be viewed at 
http://people.freebsd.org/~tabthorpe/patches/yaunc-ta.patch

The files/startup needs to be setup with USE_RC_SUBR, cf 
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/rc-scripts.html

Thomas
